Label: NPP VIIRS annual
Case: Retrieve NPP VIIRS annual NTL data for Shanghai from 2015 to 2020.

Label: DMSP-OLS annual
Case: Retrieve DMSP–OLS annual NTL data for Shanghai from 2005 to 2010.

Label: NPP-VIIRS-like annual
Case: Retrieve NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL data for Shanghai from 2010 to 2020.

Label: NPP VIIRS monthly
Case: Retrieve NPP VIIRS monthly NTL data for Shanghai from January to December 2020.

Label: VNP46A1
Case: Retrieve NPP VIIRS VNP46A1 daily NTL data for Shanghai from December 1 to December 7, 2020.

Label: VNP46A2
Case: Retrieve NPP VIIRS VNP46A2 daily NTL data for Shanghai, from January 1 to January 7, 2020.

Label: Monthly composite
Case: Retrieve NPP VIIRS VNP46A2 daily NTL data for Shanghai, from Jan 1 to Jan 31, 2020,and composite them into a monthly NTL imagery

Label: NPP VIIRS daily
Case: Retrieve VNP46A2 daily NTL imagery of Beijing during the 2022 Winter Olympics.

Label: Event news
Case: Retrieve event information about 2025 Myanmar earthquake from USGS and ReliefWeb.

Label: Administrative boundary
Case: Retrieve Shanghai's administrative boundary from Amap.

Label: POI
Case: Retrieve POI data within 200 meters of the Oriental Pearl Tower from Amap.

Label: Coordinates
Case: Retrieve coordinates for the Oriental Pearl Tower in Shanghai.

Label: SDGSAT-1 stripe noise removal
Case: Perform stripe noise removal on SDGSAT-1 GLI image at inputs/.

Label: SDGSAT-1 radiometric calibration
Case: Perform radiometric calibration on SDGSAT-1 GLI image at inputs/.

Label: SDGSAT-1 grayscale brightness
Case: Create grayscale brightness image using SDGSAT-1 GLI image at inputs/.

Label: NOAA20 preprocess
Case: Preprocess NOAA-20 VIIRS data saved in inputs/NOAA20.

Label: SDGSAT-1 NDIGR
Case: Calculate NDIGR using the SDGSAT-1 GLI image at inputs/.

Label: SDGSAT-1 RRLI
Case: Calculate RRLI using the SDGSAT-1 GLI image at inputs/.

Label: Zonal statistics
Case: Identify the district in Shanghai with the highest ANTL in a 2022 NPP-VIIRS-like image.

Label: Point statistics
Case: Identify the WGS84 coordinate of the brightest pixel of NPP-VIIRS NTL imagery in Shanghai, 2022.

Label: Point statistics
Case: Identify the WGS84 coordinate of the darkest pixel of NPP-VIIRS NTL imagery in Shanghai, June, 2022.

Label: Point statistics
Case: Report the NTL intensity of NPP-VIIRS imagery at the location of the Oriental Pearl Tower in 2020.

Label: Maximum NTL intensity [MaxNTL(P)]
Case: Calculate maximum NTL intensity of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

Label: Total NTL intensity [TNTL]
Case: Calculate total NTL intensity of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

Label: ANTL [ANTL]
Case: Calculate ANTL of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

Label: Threshold processing
Case: Within Shanghai’s 2020 administrative boundary, calculate the proportion of NPP-VIIRS NTL pixels with values greater than 50.

Label: Numerical statistics
Case: Calculate the compound annual growth rate of Total NTL intensity for Shanghai from 2015 to 2020.

Label: Numerical statistics
Case: Calculate the annual growth rate of total NTL intensity in Shanghai for each year between 2015 and 2020

Label: Numerical statistics
Case: Identify the district with the highest NTL growth rate in Shanghai from 2019 to 2020.

Label: Anomaly detection
Case: Detect anomalous pixels in Shanghai from 2015 to 2020.

Label: GEE statistics
Case: Calculate VNP46A2 average nighttime light intensity (ANTL) in Shanghai each day, from January 1, 2022, to January 31, 2022, using GEE Python Code,and save it as a csv.

Label: GEE statistics
Case: Calculate NPP-VIIRS average nighttime light intensity (ANTL) in Shanghai each year, from 2015 to 2022, using GEE Python Code,and save it as a csv.

Label: Change
Case: Download VNP46A2 daily NTL data, and detect the brightness value in the Oriental Pearl Tower, Shanghai before and after the 2024 National Day of China.

Label: Thresholded pixel extraction
Case: Extract the built-up area in Shanghai for 2018 using a threshold of 10.

Label: Different
Case: Calculate and visualize the NTL intensity difference between 2020 and 2021 in Shanghai.

Label: Visualization
Case: Download NPP-VIIRS-like imagery of Shanghai in 2020, set noise values less than 1 to NaN, and visualize using a 'viridis' color map.

Label: Compare
Case: Compare ANTL in Shanghai and Beijing in 2022 and tell me which is brighter.

Label: Trend analysis
Case: Conduct a slope trend analysis on annual NPP-VIIRS-like NTL data for Shanghai (2000–2020).

Label: COVID19
Case: Calculate the ANTL for Wuhan during the official lockdown period (January 23 – April 8, 2020), and compare it with the corresponding dates in 2019.

Label: Earthquake
Case:
Assess the impact of the 2025 Myanmar earthquake using daily NPP-VIIRS VNP46A2 imagery. Retrieve earthquake details from official sources (USGS, ReliefWeb) to identify the epicenter. Compute ANTL during pre-event and post-event periods,
 and the first night after the earthquake using the GEE Python API, and summarize results for damage assessment.

Label: GDP
Case: Please retrieve Shanghai’s GDP data and the NPP-VIIRS NTL imagery from 2013 to 2022, analyze the relationship between ANTL and GDP using multiple regression models, and select the best-fitting model.

Label: Built-Up Areas Extraction
Case: Download the 2020 NTL imagery for Shanghai. Then, extract the built-up area using the SVM method. Finally, calculate the proportion of built-up area within each district of Shanghai.

Label: Urban main roads extraction
Case: Extract urban main roads based on the SDGSAT-1 GLI NTL imagery located at inputs\SDG_rgb.tif, and convert the result to a shapefile (.shp).

Label: Streetlight classification
Case: Compute the Ratio Red Light Index (RRLI) and Ratio Blue Light Index (RBLI) based on the RGB NTL image located at inputs\SDG_rgb.tif. Then, classify the pixels into different types according to Jia et al. (2024).

Label: Cross-year annual stack
Case: Retrieve NPP-VIIRS-Like annual NTL data for Shanghai from 2005 to 2024, and export one GeoTIFF per year with consistent naming.

Label: Two-city monthly retrieval
Case: Retrieve monthly VIIRS NTL (VCMSLCFG) for Shanghai and Wuhan from 2019-01 to 2020-12, then store all monthly rasters and a manifest CSV.

Label: Daily long series server-side
Case: Compute daily ANTL time series for Shanghai for the full year 2020 using VNP46A2. Do not download all daily rasters; perform aggregation server-side in GEE and export only CSV.

Label: Mixed annual-monthly-daily sanity
Case: Retrieve annual NTL for 2020, monthly NTL for 2020-01, and daily NTL for 2020-01-15 over Shanghai. Verify temporal consistency and save a metadata report.

Label: Boundary source consistency
Case: Retrieve Shanghai administrative boundaries from both Amap/OSM pathways and compare geometry area difference ratio in a CSV report.

Label: NDVI + NTL paired retrieval
Case: Retrieve MODIS NDVI and VIIRS monthly NTL for Kunming in 2022 (monthly aligned), export paired files and a join key table by month.

Label: LandScan + NTL alignment prep
Case: Retrieve 2020 LandScan population and annual NTL for Wuhan, reproject/align to a common grid, and save aligned rasters for downstream modeling.

Label: Event-driven data package
Case: Retrieve authoritative event briefs for the 2025 Myanmar earthquake (USGS/ReliefWeb/OCHA), and collect corresponding monthly NTL before/after event for affected provinces.

Label: DMSP preprocessing workflow
Case: Retrieve DMSP-OLS annual data for 2008-2012 over Beijing and run a standard preprocessing workflow (normalization/inter-calibration) to produce cleaned annual rasters.

Label: VNP46A2 angular correction prep
Case: Retrieve a 14-day daily VNP46A2 series for Shanghai and prepare angular-correction-ready stack with metadata checks and valid pixel counts.

Label: China vs non-China admin collections
Case: Retrieve provincial boundaries for China and level-1 boundaries for Turkey, documenting which GEE collection and property fields were used.

Label: POI + boundary package
Case: Retrieve POIs related to hospitals and shelters within Wuhan boundary, and export a cleaned POI dataset with category mapping and coordinate QC.

Label: Daily-to-monthly composite protocol
Case: From VNP46A2 daily images in March 2020 over Wuhan, build monthly composite using robust median and export quality summary.

Label: Out-of-range request handling
Case: Request NPP-VIIRS annual NTL for year 1995 and return a constrained fallback plan with valid dataset/time alternatives and no hallucinated retrieval.

Label: Multi-source metadata inspector
Case: Given retrieved rasters and vectors in inputs, run geodata inspection and output a metadata audit table (CRS, bounds overlap, nodata, resolution).

Label: District ANTL ranking
Case: Calculate district-level ANTL for Shanghai 2022 and output sorted CSV plus a bar chart of top-to-bottom ranking.

Label: Yearly TNTL trend
Case: Compute city-level TNTL for Shanghai from 2015 to 2024 and output trend CSV with a line plot and CAGR value.

Label: Min/Max/Std metrics
Case: For a given NTL raster and district boundary, compute MinNTL, MaxNTL, SDNTL, and ANTL per district.

Label: Histogram-based distribution
Case: Generate pixel-value histogram statistics (quantiles + bins) for Wuhan 2020 NTL and save histogram plot + summary CSV.

Label: Lit area at thresholds
Case: For thresholds [5, 10, 20], compute lit area (LArea) for Shanghai and compare sensitivity in one summary chart.

Label: Inter-annual change map
Case: Create 2022 minus 2019 NTL change raster for Wuhan, then summarize positive/negative change area and ANTL delta.

Label: Mann-Kendall slope
Case: Use annual NTL series (2005-2024) to estimate per-pixel trend slope and p-value over Shanghai, exporting slope/p-value rasters and visualization.

Label: District panel stats
Case: Build a district-year panel (2016-2024) of ANTL and TNTL for Shanghai and output long-format CSV suitable for econometric analysis.

Label: Road buffer brightness
Case: Using road vectors and annual NTL, compute ANTL within 200m/500m/1000m road buffers and compare results.

Label: Center-periphery gradient
Case: Construct ring buffers from city center and quantify NTL decay gradient by distance bands.

Label: Weekend vs weekday daily ANTL
Case: For one month of daily NTL, compute weekday vs weekend ANTL and test whether weekend lights are significantly different.

Label: Cloud contamination robustness
Case: Compare ANTL derived from mean composite vs median composite for a noisy daily month and report robustness difference.

Label: Cross-city comparability
Case: Compare normalized ANTL of Shanghai, Wuhan, and Kunming in 2022 with consistent boundary and projection handling.

Label: Subregion hotspot extraction
Case: Extract top 5% brightest pixels within each district and summarize hotspot area share per district.

Label: Thresholded urban mask stats
Case: Use threshold-based urban extraction on annual NTL and report urban mask area + mean brightness for each district.

Label: Spatial overlap QC
Case: Given one raster and one vector with CRS mismatch, reproject correctly and quantify how much area overlaps before and after fix.

Label: Multi-index CSV
Case: For each district compute TNTL, ANTL, LArea, SDNTL in one pass and export a clean schema with Region as key.

Label: Daily anomaly index
Case: Build z-score anomaly index for daily ANTL over Wuhan in 2020 Q1 using 2019 Q1 as baseline.

Label: Province-level rollup
Case: Aggregate province-level TNTL for all China provinces for 2024 and output ranked table with top/bottom 10 highlights.

Label: 3D landscape metrics pack
Case: Implement 3DPL, 3DED, and 3DLPI on annual NTL raster and provide metric definitions and computed outputs.

Label: GDP regression baseline
Case: Using provided provincial GDP and annual TNTL panel, fit baseline regressions and report out-of-sample R2 and MAE by province.

Label: Population estimation
Case: Train a model to estimate provincial population from TNTL/ANTL features, and compare linear vs tree-based methods with cross-validation.

Label: Electricity consumption proxy
Case: Estimate provincial electricity consumption from NTL features with year fixed effects and output prediction diagnostics.

Label: CO2 proxy modeling
Case: Fit CO2 emission estimation models from NTL panel features and evaluate robustness across train/test year splits.

Label: DEI forecasting
Case: Build a DEI estimation workflow combining city-level NTL and provided DEI labels, then produce 2024 prediction with uncertainty interval.

Label: SDG 7.1.1 enhanced
Case: Estimate electrification access (SDG 7.1.1 proxy) by combining NTL and population rasters, reporting both national and province-level results.

Label: Urban center detection robust
Case: Implement localized contour-tree urban center detection for Shanghai 2020, output centers and quality checks against district structure.

Label: Disaster impact quantification
Case: For a disaster-affected city, quantify pre/post event NTL drop using matched baseline windows and provide confidence intervals.

Label: Lockdown recovery curve
Case: Model Wuhan lockdown and recovery trajectory from monthly/daily NTL using segmented regression and identify recovery turning point.

Label: Built-up extraction comparison
Case: Compare threshold-based and SVM-based urban extraction using the same annual raster and evaluate area/IoU agreement.

Label: Cross-city transfer
Case: Train a built-up/indicator model on Shanghai data and test transfer to Wuhan/Kunming, reporting transfer degradation and adaptation strategy.

Label: Feature ablation
Case: Run ablation experiments for TNTL-only, ANTL-only, and full feature set on GDP/population tasks and summarize performance delta.

Label: Temporal generalization
Case: Train on 2013-2020 and test on 2021-2024 for one socio-economic indicator, reporting drift and retraining recommendations.

Label: Explainable modeling
Case: Fit an interpretable model for provincial GDP from NTL features and output feature importance + partial dependence plots.

Label: End-to-end policy brief
Case: Produce an end-to-end analysis brief for one city: retrieval, preprocessing, zonal stats, modeling insight, and final policy-oriented conclusions with output evidence files.
